query: Novak Djokovic Wimbledon 2026 quarterfinal Roman Safiullin result score 17th quarterfinal
b_issues: Includes a low-reliability/irrelevant Wikipedia result and a Vavel snippet with an apparent score typo ("7-6, 6-6, 3-6, 6-3"). There is also minor inconsistency in tiebreak formatting between results (7-6(6) vs 7-6 (8-6)), though these describe the same first-set tiebreak score.
reasoning: Both sets contain the key answer: Djokovic beat Roman Safiullin to reach his 17th Wimbledon quarterfinal, with the score 7-6(6), 6-3, 3-6, 6-3. However, Content A enables a cleaner and more reliable answer because its top result is the official Wimbledon site explicitly stating: "He reached his 17th Wimbledon quarter-final ... with a 7-6(6), 6-3, 3-6, 6-3 win over Roman Safiullin." The other A results consistently support the same facts. Content B also has the needed facts in the featured snippet and BBC/Guardian results, but it is weakened by noisier sourcing and a misleading typo in one result, which could cause an LLM to produce an incorrect score. Therefore A better supports a correct answer.
